name: My Sweet Piano
description:
"Puk-Kyun!”

—

She’s probably my favorite Sanrio character, if you watched the My Melody and Kuromi Netflix show, you’ll know why...

Anyways... I was gone for a bit longer than expected... sorry...

This was supposed to come out before my 20 followers bot, but I kept getting sidetracked...

I promise that you’ll see more bots here. 🙏

Hopefully enough to close out November... I start working on requests first, then I’ll make my way to some of my planned bots, and everything in between.
